episodes.name: Fear of Takeoff #Slipper
episodes.overview: The last of five to join the Belle Epoque shared residence, timid Eun-jae arrives in Seoul. She finds her housemates just as cold as the city itself.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/nqgg5tlbeam8/hello-my-twenties-s01e01-720p-10bit-hindi-korean-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Is This Underwear Yours? #LiesandNoMakeupFaces
episodes.overview: House rules say men are forbidden to enter, but Ye-eun discovers men's underwear in their home. Conscience-stricken, she decides to hide it.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/a0gtkypfd46o/hello-my-twenties-s01e02-720p-10bit-hindi-korean-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: I've Never Once Loved Myself #RottenRoots
episodes.overview: After discovering I-na's secret, Ye-eun declares that she cannot live in the same house as I-na. Meanwhile, I-na encounters a strange man at a bar.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/of25gi9l5l15/hello-my-twenties-s01e03-720p-10bit-hindi-korean-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: My Dream Is To Be an Office Worker #ProofofPoverty
episodes.overview: On top of school, Jin-myung works day and night to sustain herself. She has no time for romance, but a guy from work keeps dropping hints.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/s06es8rf4jjk/hello-my-twenties-s01e04-720p-10bit-hindi-korean-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Reason For Loving Someone, The Reason For Not Loving Someone #MenandWomen
episodes.overview: In an effort to chase away the ghost in their house, the ladies of Belle Epoque decide to bring men in -- by hosting a house party.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/6645gcxya4n8/hello-my-twenties-s01e05-720p-10bit-hindi-korean-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: In Retrospect, It Was Foreshadowing #StartingPoint
episodes.overview: The party isn't a huge success, but the housemates still make it memorable while uncovering some secrets but also leaving many questions unanswered.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/t8a35qqatj47/hello-my-twenties-s01e06-720p-10bit-hindi-korean-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: I'm Someone Who Shouldn't Be Happy #SleepParalysis
episodes.overview: Money has always been a problem for Jin-myung, but when a promising job offer drops into her lap, she faces a difficult situation.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/37s2lrniaio5/hello-my-twenties-s01e07-720p-10bit-hindi-korean-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Hope, That Damn Hope #SuspiciousMan
episodes.overview: There seems to be a suspicious man lurking around Belle Epoque at night, and each of the housemates has a guess as to who it could be.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/r64co1xnbd0a/hello-my-twenties-s01e08-720p-10bit-hindi-korean-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: If You Stay In Your Place, You Won't Get Lost #Shoes
episodes.overview: While her mom is out of the country on vacation, Eun-jae learns some disconcerting news involving her family members.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/5cc9gb9zipp4/hello-my-twenties-s01e09-720p-10bit-hindi-korean-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: We Believe Because We Want To Believe #Lie
episodes.overview: When a few of the housemates make some drastic life decisions, Ji-won is worried that it's all because of the lie she fabricated.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/cdsq2cx73u4r/hello-my-twenties-s01e10-720p-10bit-hindi-korean-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: If You Watch Closely, Everyone Has Special Circumstances #Earrings
episodes.overview: With Ye-eun missing, Jin-myung's mom in a legal mess and Eun-jae awaiting the autopsy results, Belle Epoque is just riddled with problems.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/crux8uxt2p1k/hello-my-twenties-s01e11-720p-10bit-hindi-korean-esub-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Even So, Life Goes On #Aftermath
episodes.overview: As the Belle Epoque housemates discover, some things are better left unsaid, some people never change and some problems just never get solved.
